name: Jack van Wijk
review: It gives me joy to just think, I am now a Dev in Coding: Superficial Games!

name: Chloe Gray-Morgan
review: I just love to work with Jack and Neve and I just think Superficial Games... what an amazing name!

name: Neve Tucker
review: I love to organize the tree, and if Jack AND Chloe are sick, I am the boss for that day.

name: Isabelle Gao
review: I am the Guard at Superficial Games HQ and I stop people from coming in without a permit.

name: Cool Math Games
review: Visit https://coolmathgames.com to see our website! We are supporters of Superficial Games. -Cool Math Games

name: Poki
review: Visit https://poki.com to see all of our games! We like Superfical Games. They are the best!! -Poki

name: Two Player Games.org
review: Visit https://twoplayergames.org to see all of the 2 Player Games!! We like Superfical Games. They are the best, we are their sponsor.! -Two Player Games.org

name: Crazy Games
review: https://crazygames.com is our website. Visit it! Superficial Games is great, too.
